24 of 30 items

Slippers & Flipflop

Slide into the world of comfort with our favorite collection of Chappal & Flip Flops. These are not only comfortable for your feet but are also durable. Choose from an array of playful colors, styles, and designs that make them an indispensable part of your wardrobe. You could style them with track pants, joggers as well as with jeans. Grab your pair of chappals and flip flop now and update your wardrobe.

slippers for men,slipper for men, men slippers, slippers men,



Comfortable Chappal For Men

When it comes to keeping your feet warm, nothing compares to a good pair of cozy chappals that you can wear around the house. It doesn't matter if you're lounging around the house watching Netflix, destroying your latest season on FIFA, or simply staying in a T-shirt and pants all day (we've all been there), a pair of chappals are the ultimate comfort item for the home.

There are a wide variety of chappals available on the market today, ranging from the traditional, run-of-the-mill traditional 'old man' type chappals to furry chappals, plush, and chappals that are designed to look like trainers.

Things That Are Crucial to Search for in a Pair of chappals There are a few essential factors that you need to think about before you go out and purchase your very first, second, or even third pair of chappals.

  •    ● How frequently should I expect to put these on?

  •    ● What style do I want?

  •    ● What kinds of materials are used to make them?

  •    ● Will I have to put them on when I go outside?

  •    ● Which color chappal, slip-on, or flat back do you recommend?


This point may be irrelevant, given that you're purchasing chappals to give them as presents, but let's think about it anyway. If you are thinking, "I'll just buy a pair for now and get another later," you should probably consider whether or not they will fit in with how you live your life before making the purchase. Black or Brown or some other funky colors, Bata have a wide variety of cozy, kolhapuri chappals and anti skid slippers for you!

If you are going to use them daily, then it may make sense to invest in a pair that is of high quality, durable, and long-lasting; however, if you are only going to use them occasionally as a treat, then it may not be worth the additional money.

The Many Varieties of chappals and How to Pick the Right One for You The question is, what kind of brown chappal are you trying to find? This will be determined by both your taste and the rest of the items in your loungewear wardrobe. If you already have a favorite pair of house shoes, this will probably determine the style of chappals you wear around the house.

For instance, if you like the traditional style of chappals with a flat back, you'll likely purchase another pair. On the other hand, if you want your footwear to have a "jazzy" appearance, you should consider purchasing a plush pair. Consider buying a pair of chappals styled like sneakers for an updated look. Bata has got you covered no matter what style of chappals you're looking for because they have them all. Chappals ranging from classic to contemporary can be found at Bata.
